name: Scalac
product: Software development — Scala, Blockchain, Machine Learning, Data Engineering
pricing_tier: Team Extension EUR 6-8K/engineer/month | Projects: fixed + T&M | Consulting: EUR 1.5-2K/day
value_proposition: Europe's largest Scala team (150+ engineers) delivering production-grade blockchain, ML and data systems — without the 6-month hiring cycle

competitors.name: VirtusLab
competitors.weakness: Smaller blockchain practice; limited ML/data offerings

competitors.name: SoftwareMill
competitors.weakness: No dedicated blockchain or ML division; smaller scale

competitors.name: EPAM
competitors.weakness: Generalist outsourcing — not Scala-specialised; higher turnover

competitors.name: BairesDev
competitors.weakness: LatAm timezone mismatch for EU clients; no Scala/blockchain depth

competitors.name: 10Clouds
competitors.weakness: Design-first agency — weaker engineering depth; no FP/blockchain

target.segment: Series A-C startups & enterprises adopting Scala, blockchain or data-intensive architectures
target.decision_maker: CTO / VP Engineering / Head of Product
pain_points: Cannot hire senior Scala engineers — 6+ month lead time
Blockchain project stalled — no internal Substrate/EVM expertise
ML models work in Jupyter but fail in production
Need to scale engineering 3x in 90 days for Series B/C
Legacy data pipeline breaking under load — need real-time streaming

differentiators: Largest pure-play Scala team in Europe — 150+ engineers, average 5 years Scala experience
Deep blockchain practice: Substrate (Polkadot), EVM (Solidity), Cosmos SDK — 40+ engineers
Machine Learning & Data Engineering: 30+ engineers, Spark/Flink/Kafka production experience
Functional programming pedigree since 2014 — contributors to Cats, Akka, ZIO ecosystems
Time-to-productivity: senior engineers productive in 2 weeks (vs 3+ months industry average)
Retention rate 92% (industry average 70%) — teams stay together for multi-year engagements

case_studies.result: Built exchange handling $4.5B AUM, 99.99% uptime, sub-100ms order execution
case_studies.quote: Scalac engineers understood both the trading domain and blockchain infrastructure from day one.

case_studies.result: Launched marketplace processing 50K+ daily transactions, $12M GMV in first quarter
case_studies.quote: From architecture to production in 4 months — Scalac moved faster than our in-house team.

case_studies.result: Real-time route optimisation reducing delivery costs by 23% across 12 markets
case_studies.quote: The data pipeline Scalac built processes 2M+ events per minute without breaking a sweat.

case_studies.result: Migrated monolith to microservices — deployment frequency 1x/month to 15x/day
case_studies.quote: Scala migration was riskiest decision we made. Scalac de-risked it completely.
